title: Typed Async Work, Platform APIs, and Cancellation · Stakeholder TypeScript Mission
summary: Residents using a public status interface. The client must validate changing external data, represent every request state, cancel work, and preserve accessible UI behavior. Planned artifact: Deliver Validated Cancellable Data Client with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design variants with stable literal discriminants and variant-specific required data.
Use never assignments or exhaustive helpers to make newly added variants produce actionable diagnostics.
Receive external JSON, storage, DOM, environment, and message data as unknown until evidence narrows it.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
